# `.github/workflows/release.yml`

**YAML** · 103 lines · 3,712 bytes · 1 commit(s) · first 2026-06-07 · last 2026-06-07

## Purpose

Builds the downloader jar AND the desktop manager, bundles the jar + docker-compose + full source into the NSIS installer, and publishes a GitHub release (installer + jar + source zip) on every push to main and on manual dispatch.
